member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IMediator
member.summary: Defines a mediator to encapsulate request/response and publishing interaction patterns. Combines and into a single interface.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.INotificationHandler`1
member.summary: Defines a handler for a notification
member.typeparam: The type of notification being handled

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.INotificationHandler`1.Handle(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles a notification
member.returns: A task representing the handling operation

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.INotificationPublisher
member.summary: Defines a custom strategy for publishing notifications to a set of handlers. Register as a service to override the default notification dispatching behavior.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.INotificationPublisher.Publish(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{SwiftMediator.Core.NotificationHandlerExecutor},SwiftMediator.Core.INotification,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes a notification to the given handlers.
member.param: The set of handler executors to invoke

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.NotificationHandlerExecutor
member.summary: Wraps a notification handler instance with its execution delegate. Provides access to the handler instance for custom publisher implementations that may need to inspect, order, or filter handlers.

member.name: P:SwiftMediator.Core.NotificationHandlerExecutor.HandlerInstance
member.summary: The handler instance.

member.name: P:SwiftMediator.Core.NotificationHandlerExecutor.HandlerCallback
member.summary: The delegate that invokes the handler.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.NotificationHandlerExecutor.#ctor(System.Object,System.Func{SwiftMediator.Core.INotification,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask})
member.summary: Initializes a new .
member.param: The delegate that invokes the handler.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.ForeachAwaitPublisher
member.summary: Default notification publisher that executes handlers sequentially (foreach-await). This is the default when no custom is registered.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.TaskWhenAllPublisher
member.summary: Notification publisher that awaits all handlers in parallel using .

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.FireAndForgetPublisher
member.summary: Notification publisher that fires all handlers in the background without waiting. Exceptions are suppressed.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.RequestHandlerDelegate`1
member.summary: Represents an async continuation for the next task to execute in the pipeline
member.typeparam: Response type

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IPipelineBehavior`2
member.summary: Pipeline behavior to surround the inner handler.
member.typeparam: Request type
Response type

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.IPipelineBehavior`2.Handle(`0,SwiftMediator.Core.RequestHandlerDelegate{`1},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pipeline handler. Perform any additional behavior and await the delegate as necessary
member.param: Awaitable delegate for the next action in the pipeline. Eventually this delegate represents the handler.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IPublisher
member.summary: Publish a notification event through the mediator to be handled by multiple handlers.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.IPublisher.PublishAsync``1(``0,SwiftMediator.Core.PublishStrategy,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously publish a notification to all registered handlers.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequestExceptionAction`2
member.summary: Defines an action to execute when an exception is thrown during request processing. Unlike , actions cannot handle (suppress) the exception — they only observe it (e.g., for logging or metrics). All registered actions execute regardless of whether an exception handler subsequently handles the exception.
member.typeparam: The type of request that caused the exception
The type of exception to observe

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequestExceptionAction`2.Execute(`0,`1,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Called when is thrown while handling .

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequestExceptionHandler`3
member.summary: Defines a handler for exceptions thrown during request processing. Multiple exception handlers can be registered for the same request type; they execute in registration order. Set to stop propagation.
member.typeparam: The type of request that caused the exception
The response type of the request
The type of exception to handle

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequestExceptionHandler`3.Handle(`0,`2,SwiftMediator.Core.RequestExceptionHandlerState{`1},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Called when is thrown while handling .
member.param: State object — set and to suppress the exception.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.RequestExceptionHandlerState`1
member.summary: Mutable state passed to . Setting to true prevents the exception from being re-thrown.
member.typeparam: The response type

member.name: P:SwiftMediator.Core.RequestExceptionHandlerState`1.Handled
member.summary: When set to true, the exception is considered handled and will not be re-thrown. The value will be returned to the caller instead.

member.name: P:SwiftMediator.Core.RequestExceptionHandlerState`1.Response
member.summary: The fallback response to return when is true.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.RequestExceptionHandlerState`1.SetHandled(`0)
member.summary: Marks the exception as handled and provides a fallback response.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequestHandler`2
member.summary: Defines a handler for a request
member.typeparam: The type of request being handled
The type of response from the handler

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequestHandler`2.Handle(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles a request

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequestHandler`1
member.summary: Defines a handler for a request with a void (Unit) response.
member.typeparam: The type of request being handled

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequestPreProcessor`1
member.summary: Executed before the request handler (but after pipeline behaviors). Useful for logging, validation setup, or enriching the request context. Multiple pre-processors can be registered; they run in registration order.
member.typeparam: The type of request being processed

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequestPreProcessor`1.Process(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Process method executed before the request handler.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequestPostProcessor`2
member.summary: Executed after the request handler completes successfully (but before pipeline behaviors return). Useful for audit logging, cache population, or response enrichment. Multiple post-processors can be registered; they run in registration order.
member.typeparam: The type of request being processed
The response type

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequestPostProcessor`2.Process(`0,`1,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Process method executed after the request handler.
member.param: The response returned by the handler

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.ISender
member.summary: Send a request through the mediator pipeline to be handled by a single handler.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.ISender.SendAsync``2(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously send a request to a single handler using JIT optimized generics.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.ISender.SendAsync(System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously send a request to a single handler using dynamic dispatch (object-based).

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.ISender.CreateStream``2(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates an async enumerable stream from a streaming request handler.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.StreamHandlerDelegate`1
member.summary: Represents an async continuation for the next task to execute in the stream pipeline.
member.typeparam: Streamed item type
member.returns: An async enumerable of response items

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IStreamPipelineBehavior`2
member.summary: Pipeline behavior to surround the inner stream handler. Works like but for streaming requests.
member.typeparam: Stream request type
Streamed item type

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.IStreamPipelineBehavior`2.Handle(`0,SwiftMediator.Core.StreamHandlerDelegate{`1},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stream pipeline handler. Perform any additional behavior and return the delegate's result. You may wrap, filter, or transform the stream.
member.param: Delegate for the next action in the pipeline (eventually the handler)
member.returns: An async enumerable of response items

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IStreamRequestHandler`2
member.summary: Defines a handler for a streaming request that yields items via .
member.typeparam: The type of streaming request being handled
The type of each streamed response item

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.IStreamRequestHandler`2.Handle(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles a streaming request
member.returns: An async enumerable of response items

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorExtensions
member.summary: Convenience extension methods for .

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorExtensions.SendAsync``1(SwiftMediator.Core.ISender,``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a void (Unit) request without needing to specify the Unit response type.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration
member.summary: Fluent configuration for SwiftMediator DI registration. Supports assembly scanning, explicit pipeline registrations, and lifetime configuration.

member.name: P:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.Lifetime
member.summary: The for all request, notification, and stream handlers. Defaults to .

member.name: P:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.MediatorLifetime
member.summary: The for the registration itself. Defaults to .

member.name: P:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.NotificationPublisherType
member.summary: Optional: set a custom type. When set, all notification publishes will delegate to this publisher.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.RegisterServicesFromAssembly(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Scan the given assembly for pipeline behaviors, pre/post processors, exception handlers, and exception actions. Registers them automatically.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.RegisterServicesFromAssemblyContaining``1
member.summary: Scan the assembly containing for pipeline services.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.RegisterServicesFromAssemblyContaining(System.Type)
member.summary: Scan the assembly containing for pipeline services.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.AddOpenBehavior(System.Type,System.Nullable{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime})
member.summary: Register an open generic pipeline behavior. Example: cfg.AddOpenBehavior(typeof(LoggingBehavior<,>))

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.AddBehavior``1(System.Nullable{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime})
member.summary: Register a closed pipeline behavior by its concrete type.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.AddOpenStreamBehavior(System.Type,System.Nullable{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime})
member.summary: Register an open generic stream pipeline behavior. Example: cfg.AddOpenStreamBehavior(typeof(StreamLoggingBehavior<,>))

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.AddStreamBehavior``1(System.Nullable{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime})
member.summary: Register a closed stream pipeline behavior by its concrete type.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.AddRequestPreProcessor``1(System.Nullable{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime})
member.summary: Register a closed request pre-processor.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.AddOpenRequestPreProcessor(System.Type,System.Nullable{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime})
member.summary: Register an open generic request pre-processor.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.AddRequestPostProcessor``1(System.Nullable{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime})
member.summary: Register a closed request post-processor.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.AddOpenRequestPostProcessor(System.Type,System.Nullable{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime})
member.summary: Register an open generic request post-processor.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.AddExceptionHandler``1(System.Nullable{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime})
member.summary: Register a closed exception handler.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.AddExceptionAction``1(System.Nullable{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime})
member.summary: Register a closed exception action.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.SetNotificationPublisher``1
member.summary: Set a custom notification publisher. When registered, the mediator delegates all notification publishes to this publisher instead of the built-in strategies.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.RegisterMediator``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers the mediator implementation along with ISender and IPublisher forwarding services. Called by the source-generated AddSwiftMediator method.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.RegisterHandler(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Type)
member.summary: Registers a concrete handler type with the configured handler lifetime. Called by the source-generated AddSwiftMediator method.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.RegisterOpenGenericHandler(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Registers an open generic handler with the configured handler lifetime. Called by the source-generated AddSwiftMediator method.

member.name: M:SwiftMediator.Core.MediatorServiceConfiguration.Apply(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Applies all fluent registrations and assembly scanning results to the service collection. Called by the source-generated AddSwiftMediator method as the final step.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.PublishStrategy
member.summary: Defines the strategy for executing multiple notification handlers.

member.name: F:SwiftMediator.Core.PublishStrategy.Sequential
member.summary: Executes all handlers sequentially. Default behavior.

member.name: F:SwiftMediator.Core.PublishStrategy.Parallel
member.summary: Executes all handlers in parallel using Task.WhenAll.

member.name: F:SwiftMediator.Core.PublishStrategy.FireAndForget
member.summary: Starts all handlers in parallel but does not wait for their completion.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.SwiftMediatorOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for AddSwiftMediator. Allows customizing handler registration lifetimes.

member.name: P:SwiftMediator.Core.SwiftMediatorOptions.Lifetime
member.summary: The for all request, notification, and stream handlers. Defaults to .

member.name: P:SwiftMediator.Core.SwiftMediatorOptions.MediatorLifetime
member.summary: The for the registration itself. Defaults to .

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.HandlerLifetime
member.summary: Specifies the DI registration lifetime for handlers and the mediator.

member.name: F:SwiftMediator.Core.HandlerLifetime.Transient
member.summary: A new instance is created each time it is requested.

member.name: F:SwiftMediator.Core.HandlerLifetime.Scoped
member.summary: A single instance is created per scope (e.g. per HTTP request).

member.name: F:SwiftMediator.Core.HandlerLifetime.Singleton
member.summary: A single instance is shared across the entire application.
